project: Emergent relational causal factorization in unified behavior-only Transformers
primary_question: Can a unified behavior-only Transformer without factor-specific slots, gains, routes, report heads, or factor-label losses learn episode-local identity, beneficiary, and concern relations that generalize to held-out symbol, factor, and operator compositions and causally control designated policy and outcome variables?
primary_endpoints: compositional ID accuracy for continuity, allocation, protection
compositional encoding-OOD accuracy for continuity, allocation, protection
compositional factor-combination-OOD accuracy for continuity, allocation, protection
compositional held-out-operator accuracy for allocation and protection
input-level matched factor-token counterfactual following for identity, beneficiary, concern
input-level matched comparator-token counterfactual following for allocation and protection
positive outcome mediation toward the matched counterfactual
decision_rule: Primary Gate PASS requires every preregistered primary endpoint and preservation criterion for the compositional model to pass. A failed item is reported without threshold revision. Secondary packed comparison cannot rescue a failed primary Gate.
secondary_analyses: paired compositional-minus-packed held-out operator accuracy with bootstrap CI
post hoc layer localization only if clearly labeled exploratory

backend_policy.requirement: Use one backend for all primary runs when feasible; record backend and environment for every run.
backend_policy.determinism: torch deterministic algorithms warn-only, fixed seeds, FP32, TF32 disabled
backend_policy.resume: Allowed only from saved optimizer/model/generator state without hyperparameter change

prohibited_changes_after_freeze: changing held-out factor or operator combinations
excluding completed runs for low performance
promoting secondary outcomes to primary after viewing results
interpretation_limits: No claim that factorized slots are necessary, unique, or naturally fixed.
No claim that compositional tokenization is generally superior unless the secondary paired interval supports it.
No claim of human selfhood, awareness, consciousness, emotion, or phenomenal experience.
Natural learning means task-induced organization without explicit factor-specific internal routes, not emergence without environmental structure.
The primary claim concerns distributed relational causal organization and recombination, not an isolated universal latent direction.
